raw:
{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.2": 3, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies key conceptual issues (overclaiming, framing drift) and proposes revisions to tighten the discussion. Doesn't fully map against prior work but offers a good starting point.", "R1.2": "Identifies some logical inconsistencies (e.g., overgeneralization of findings), but doesn't walk the entire argument chain or propose comprehensive repairs.", "R1.4": "Names relevant prior work in constrained RL but doesn't provide a detailed comparison or articulate sharp deltas.", "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty regarding the generalizability of findings and the strength of evidence for certain claims.", "RX.3": "Mostly adheres to the requested scope (discussion section) with one minor drift (literature commentary placement).", "RX.4": "No regressions identified; avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.", "RX.5": "Lacks traceability for most suggestions, primarily offering high-level feedback."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.2": 0.7, "R1.4": 0.6, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.85, "RX.4": 0.95, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies key conceptual issues (overclaiming, framing drift) and proposes revisions to tighten the discussion. Doesn't fully map against prior work but offers a good starting point.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies some logical inconsistencies (e.g., overgeneralization of findings), but doesn't walk the entire argument chain or propose comprehensive repairs.
rationale.R1.4: Names relevant prior work in constrained RL but doesn't provide a detailed comparison or articulate sharp deltas.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty regarding the generalizability of findings and the strength of evidence for certain claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly adheres to the requested scope (discussion section) with one minor drift (literature commentary placement).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Lacks traceability for most suggestions, primarily offering high-level feedback.
